'''Gottlegoob''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. During the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Presidency]] of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], its people suffered from famine.

{{Planet-stub}}
